description_long: This is a realistic depiction of a goat-like sheep with a sturdy, well-proportioned body covered in short, coarse fur. Its coat is primarily a light brown with subtle gradients of white and darker brown, especially on the underbelly and legs. The animal has two prominent, backward-curving horns and a distinctive beard under its chin. Its ears are medium-sized, slightly pointed, and project outward from the sides of its head. The tail is short and held straight, while the legs are robust and end in cloven hooves. The overall appearance suggests a healthy, mature animal suited for outdoor environments.
description: A robust, light brown sheep with backward-curving horns, a short straight tail, and a coarse, short-haired coat.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sheep's face, both horns, beard, and the symmetry of its legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full body profile, horn curvature, beard, and the straight tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad back, short tail, and the color gradient on the hindquarters.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the body profile, horn shape, and beard.
attribute_wool_pattern: The wool appears short, coarse, and relatively uniform, with subtle color gradients from light brown to white and darker brown patches. There are no visible curls or waves, and the texture looks straight and dense.
attribute_horn_presence: large; two prominent, backward-curving horns extend from the top of the head.
attribute_ear_shape: The ears are medium-sized, slightly pointed, and project outward from the sides of the head. They are not drooping and have a subtle taper toward the tips.
attribute_tail_position: The tail is short, straight, and held horizontally, extending just slightly away from the body and clearly visible from the rear.
attribute_leg_posture: The legs are straight and sturdy, positioned to support a standing posture. All four legs are firmly planted, indicating the animal is stationary and balanced.
